title: galium pusillum subsp. tenue
intro: Galium pusillum subsp. tenue, also known as small bedstraw or slender bedstraw, is a subspecies of the small bedstraw plant, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Galium pusillum subsp. tenue include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight infections, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Galium pusillum subsp. tenue include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
